# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent istio egress unrestricted.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.thirdparty.com
  addresses:
  - 203.0.113.0/24
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS
  endpoints:
  - address: api.thirdparty.com
    ports:
      https: 443
    labels:
      app: third-party-api

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
  - db.external.com
  addresses:
  - 203.0.113.1/32
  ports:
  - number: 5432
    name: postgres
    protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
  endpoints:
  - address: db.external.com
    ports:
      postgres: 5432
    labels:
      app: external-database

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: third-party-api-routing
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.thirdparty.com
  gateways:
  - mesh
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: /v1/
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.thirdparty.com
        port:
          number: 443
      rewrite:
        uri: /v1/
    - destination:
        host: api.thirdparty.com
        port:
          number: 443
      rewrite:
        uri: /v2/

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-database-routing
spec:
  hosts:
  - db.external.com
  gateways:
  - mesh
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 5432
    route:
    - destination:
        host: db.external.com
        port:
          number: 5432
